description: Report date (YYYY-MM-DD). Primary time dimension for device model analysis.
GA4 property ID (e.g. properties/297809897). Identifies the GA4 account.
Fivetran-generated unique hash ID for the row. Used for deduplication.
Specific device model name used by the user (e.g. SM-A705YN / iPhone 14 / (not set)). Granular device-level dimension.
Number of key/conversion events (goal completions) recorded on this device model.
Total number of users (new + returning) who used this device model.
Total number of all GA4 events fired on this device model.
Number of first-time users on this device model.
Ratio of engaged sessions to total sessions (0.0–1.0). Multiply by 100 for percentage.
Number of engaged sessions on this device model.
Timestamp when Fivetran last synced this row from the source.
Total revenue attributed to sessions on this device model (in account currency).
